name: Emerson DeltaV Edge REST API
description:
REST API for accessing DeltaV Edge Environment data including control hierarchy,
runtime process values, historical/cached process values, alarms and events,
and batch events.

## Authentication
All data endpoints require a Bearer token obtained via one of the Login endpoints.
Tokens expire every 24 hours (configurable in DeltaV Edge Manager).
When a token expires, the API returns a "No authorization" message.

## Query Patterns
The Graph and History endpoints support two query patterns:
- **By Entity ID**: Use the entity/parameter ID directly in the URL path segment.
- **By Path**: Use the `path` query parameter with format `{system_name}/{shortest_unique_path}`.
  Path queries only work for objects under Control Strategies and Recipes.

## Date/Time Format
All date/time parameters use ISO 8601 format (e.g., `2023-09-17T11:00:00.000Z`).

## TLS/SSL
The API is served over HTTPS. Certificates can be managed through the DeltaV Edge Manager.
